scripts.build: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && pnpm --filter @perth-gig-finder/shared build && pnpm --filter @perth-gig-finder/scraper build && pnpm --filter @perth-gig-finder/web build
scripts.local:bootstrap: pnpm supabase:start && pnpm supabase:reset && pnpm scrape
scripts.verify: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && pnpm -r test && pnpm build
scripts.web:dev: node scripts/ensure-local-supabase.mjs && pnpm --filter @perth-gig-finder/web exec next dev --webpack --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3001
